title: メジロ家の歩み・春秋お祭りフィーバー

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait a moment, is that what I think it is? That's
rare as all get-out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A Dual Grand Prix! Yaaaaay! Way to go, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Bright! You were great out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You totally swept the Takarazuka Kinen and the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ryan, Palmer, thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I remember when you won the Takarazuka Kinen,
Ryan. I could never forget your smiling face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Things got pretty heated between
McQueen and me at the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But that win gave me confidence. It made me
realize I had something special that even
McQueen couldn't beat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And the first Mejiro to win both Grands Prix was...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep, you're looking at her! I thought I was the
underdog at the Takarazuka Kinen, but at the
Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaa? I'm the fifteenth favorite?! How could I
drop even lower after winning the Takarazuka
Kinen?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Isn't that, like, anti-logical?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's the luck of the draw? The roster's full
of front runners.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I guess you could say it's kind of fun
being outside the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It just makes victory all the sweeter, seeing the
crowd go wild after I beat those low expectations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Guess it does cause a whole lotta hoopla. Does
that mean you're gonna go all out today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm not holding back! Try your best to
catch me, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then, at the race, I pulled waaaay ahead of
everyone else and got that second win! It felt so
good getting all those cheers!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That's so like you, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, Bright, from where the two of us are
standing, it kinda looks like the Mejiros are
missing something. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Missing something? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Party vibes, duh! McQueen can handle all the
traditional stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But I think we should make the Mejiro house a party house!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
P-party house? Uh, can you try not to muddle
Bright's head with your weird ideas?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Come on, it'd be nice to take it easy once in a
while and celebrate! Waheeeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, like this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! It's a bit too relaxed for my taste, but
pretty much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Alright, Grand Prix gang, on three!

text_block_list.name: Bright & Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their gleeful laughter echoes throughout the
room. A front runner and a final stretch dasher.
Two polar opposites, yet they're both Grand Prix
champions.
